channel.title: Notes on Thomas Killestein
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Thomas Killestein

item.title: Making a website
item.description:
This page is intended as a partial tutorial to make your own website. I’ll outline the steps I took to make this page, and add links to additional information. This is a work in progress and wil evolve as I have time to write it.

Building the site

There are multiple different solutions to build your own webpage. For fast load times, easy content management, and general ease of use I built mine using the Hugo static site generator.
Building a public, multicolour, legacy dataset for SN2023ixf from community observations
